summary: This relationship is characterized by severe emotional and verbal abuse, financial control, and physical intimidation, creating a toxic and unsafe environment. The power imbalance and lack of trust have eroded the foundation of the relationship.
key_insights: The relationship is highly abusive with multiple forms of abuse present.
There is significant power imbalance with one partner exerting control.
Emotional withdrawal and fear of abandonment prevent healthy connection.
